description: An entity comprised of one or more natural persons with a particular purpose. [adapted from Wikipedia](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Organization)
label: Organization
name: Organization

https://openminds.om-i.org/props/acronym._instruction: Enter the acronym of this organization.
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/acronym.label: Acronym
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/acronym.name: acronym

https://openminds.om-i.org/props/alterna._instruction: Enter any other known name or acronym of this organization.
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/alterna.label: Alternate name
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/alterna.name: alternateName

https://openminds.om-i.org/props/country._instruction: Add the country where the organization was formed.
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/country.label: Country of formation
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/country.name: countryOfFormation

https://openminds.om-i.org/props/digital._instruction: Add all globally unique and persistent digital identifier of this organization.
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/digital.description: Digital handle to identify objects or legal persons.
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/digital.label: Digital identifier
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/digital.name: digitalIdentifier

https://openminds.om-i.org/props/hasPare._instruction: Add all parent organizations of this organization.
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/hasPare.description: Reference to a parent object or legal person.
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/hasPare.label: Has parent
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/hasPare.name: hasParent

https://openminds.om-i.org/props/homepag._instruction: Enter the internationalized resource identifier (IRI) to the homepage of this organization.
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/homepag.description: Main website of something or someone.
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/homepag.label: Homepage
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/homepag.name: homepage

https://openminds.om-i.org/props/jurisdi._instruction: Add the jurisdiction under which the organization operates.
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/jurisdi.label: Jurisdiction
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/jurisdi.name: jurisdiction

https://openminds.om-i.org/props/locatio._instruction: Add the headquarters location of this organization.
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/locatio.label: Location
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/locatio.name: location

https://openminds.om-i.org/props/members._instruction: Add all membership records (one per member) for this organization. Who is considered a qualified member is typically defined in the organization’s membership agreements.
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/members.label: Memberships
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/members.name: memberships

https://openminds.om-i.org/props/name._instruction: Enter the organization’s preferred name for use in international contexts.
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/name.description: Word or phrase that constitutes the distinctive designation of a being or thing.
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/name.label: Name
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/name.name: name

https://openminds.om-i.org/props/type._instruction: Add the type of this organization (legal entity or organizational unit).
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/type.description: Distinct class to which a group of entities or concepts with similar characteristics or attributes belong to.
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/type.label: Type
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/type.name: type
